sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80185" key="pa/xusma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάχ-υσμα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n80185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thickening</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.59</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n80185.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς μερικὰς ψυχὰς ἀπὸ τῶν π. χωρίζων τῆς ὕλης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.101</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> P.</sense> </entryFree>
